headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise declared a cash dividend of $0.953125 per share on its 7.625% Series C Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.
investor_impact: This is a routine preferred dividend declaration for the Series C Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock and has no material impact on the common equity investment thesis. It signals continued normal course operations and adherence to preferred equity obligations.
key_figures: 7.625% Series C Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
